title: SQL: no error about invalid *qualified* column name
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE way_tags (way INT, waysid INT, tag VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO way_tags (way, waysid, tag) VALUES (1, 100, 'tag1');
INSERT INTO way_tags (way, waysid, tag) VALUES (2, NULL, 'tag2');
SELECT * FROM way_tags WHERE waysid IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid qualified column name in SQL query
